examples: Suddenly the cow kicked up its hind legs.
A goat was standing up against a tree on its hind legs, trying to get at the leaves.
Snake embryos, for example, sprout hind limb buds.
One kicked him so hard with its hind legs that it split his hand open.
So too Hind Hariri, 24, the daughter of the late Lebanese Prime Minister Rafik Al-Hariri.
